description: Playground-optimised patches for the TfL API. Adds default examples so the Try-it flow works out of the box.

patches.description: Pre-fill 'modes' parameter with 'tube' so the playground sends a valid request immediately.

parameters.name: modes
parameters.description: Comma-separated transport mode(s). Use `tube`, `bus`, `dlr`, or `elizabeth-line`. Defaults to `tube` in the playground.

patches.description: Pre-fill 'query' with a known station name for a ready-to-run playground request.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Station or stop name to search for. Try `King's Cross`, `Paddington`, or `Liverpool Street`.
